title: plantmanager.equipment.created data
description: PLACEHOLDER — this schema is provisional and will change before v1 is finalised. Data payload for the plantmanager.equipment.created event, emitted when an equipment record is created in PlantManager.

tenantKey.description: Tenant identifier of the organization that owns the record.

tagNumber.description: Equipment tag number as displayed in PlantManager.

createdAt.description: UTC timestamp when the equipment record was created.

createdBy.description: Identity of the user or service that created the record.
